title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Brigade Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Brigade Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!
